metadata.file_path: /Volumes/My Passport/Ojo otra vez musica de Tidal Original descarga/Consolidado2025/Tracks/Duran Duran - Rio (2001 Remaster).flac
metadata.title: Rio (2001 Remaster)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:38.54] Moving on the floor now, babe, you're a bird of paradise
[00:45.14] Cherry ice cream smile, I suppose it's very nice
[00:51.34] With a step to your left and a flick to the right, you catch that mirror way out west
[00:58.81] You know you're something special, and you look like you're the best
[01:09.06] Her name is Rio and she dances on the sand
[01:16.08] Just like that river twisting through a dusty land
[01:22.76] And when she shines, she really shows you all she can
[01:29.49] Oh Rio, Rio, dance across the Rio Grande
[01:35.93] 
[01:49.87] I've seen you on the beach, I've seen you on TV
[01:57.05] Two of a billion stars, it means so much to me
[02:05.38] Like a birthday or a pretty view
[02:10.54] But then I'm sure that you know it's just for you
[02:20.62] Her name is Rio and she dances on the sand
[02:27.42] Just like that river twisting through a dusty land
[02:34.58] And when she shines, she really shows you all she can
[02:41.37] Oh Rio, Rio, dance across the Rio Grande
[02:47.53] 
[03:42.34] Hey now, wooh, look at that, did she nearly run you down?
[03:48.56] At the end of the drive, the lawmen arrive
[03:52.15] You make me feel alive, alive, alive
[03:57.84] I'll take my chance, 'cause luck is on my side or something
[04:04.10] I know what you're thinking, I'll tell you something, I know what you're thinking
[04:13.26] Her name is Rio and she dances on the sand
[04:19.91] Just like that river twists across a dusty land
[04:26.87] And when she shines, she really shows you all she can
[04:33.63] Oh Rio, Rio, dance across the Rio Grande
[04:40.38] Her name is Rio, she don't need to understand
[04:47.01] And I might find her if I'm looking like I can
[04:54.14] Oh Rio, Rio, hear them shout across the land
[05:00.82] From mountains in the north down to the Rio Grande
[05:07.31]
